stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the functions of the passenger oxygen system?

options.a: You can start or stop the flow of oxygen to individual masks from the passenger oxygen system.
options.b: You can control the pressure of oxygen delivered to the cockpit crew only.
options.c: The system allows you to adjust the concentration of oxygen in the passenger cabin.
options.d: The system enables you to mix oxygen with cabin air for better temperature control.
